历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 975→775→664→780→723, showing a fluctuating but generally advancing trend, with a baseline of about 723 in 2025. In the recent 3 years (2023–2025), the ranking fluctuated narrowly between 664 and 780, and in 2025 it advanced by about 57 places compared to 2024. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category (including Science) were 92, 92, 90, 90, and 89 respectively, showing a slow decreasing trend. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 84, a decrease of 5 from 2025 (a reduction of about 5.6%), which will increase competition intensity and push the admission ranking forward (smaller number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 11th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking (Top20), with a continuous rise in recent years (from 15th in 2021 to 11th in 2026). The university's comprehensive strength and reputation are steadily increasing, attracting high-scoring students. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', mainly due to the Yang Yun incident involving moral misconduct and academic fraud, which may have a certain negative impact on some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 56th (relatively hot), with average short video exposure. No obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded. Negative public opinion may slightly weaken application enthusiasm, but Beihang's foundation as a top engineering university remains solid. It has 7 A+ disciplines including Instrument Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, and Aerospace Science and Technology, as well as 4 A disciplines such as Information and Communication Engineering and Control Science and Engineering, with a total of 16 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating top-tier academic strength and strong appeal to high-quality students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of Computer Science cooled significantly in 2024 compared to 2023 but remains recommended; Electronic Information/Communication and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended, closely aligned with Beihang's advantageous engineering fields. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in the province is about 268,000, a slight increase from 266,000 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Beihang is located in Beijing, not a local university. In 2025, its enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province was about 3.34% (20/598), which is normal for an out-of-province university. The Beijing region has a strong appeal to Jiangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating but advancing trend of historical rankings, the planned enrollment reduction of about 5.6% in 2026 (pushing rankings forward), the continuous improvement of the university's level (Soft Science ranking rising to 11th), and the top-tier strength of advantageous disciplines (16 disciplines at A- or above) as positive factors, along with the significantly negative reputation public opinion in 2026 (Yang Yun incident) which may slightly weaken application enthusiasm, and the slight increase in local candidates as negative factors, based on the 2025 baseline of 723, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will advance to about 699, with a range of 615–783.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Aerospace Leading Plan)
- Artificial Intelligence (Excellent Talent Training Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computing and Intelligent Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Aviation)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Engineer Project-Based Education Experimental Class)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Excellent Talent Training Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Medical-Engineering Cross Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Quantum Technology Pioneer Plan).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 699, with a range of 615–783. If the ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<615), focus on reaching for Tier 1 programs like Future Aerospace Leading Plan and Artificial Intelligence Excellence Class. If the ranking is near the upper limit (>783), it is recommended to mainly choose stable Tier 3 programs. Beihang's engineering strength is top-tier, with Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Aerospace and Aviation being highly popular directions, making application competition fierce.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 644→635→555→498→495, showing a continuous upward trend overall. In the recent 3 years (2023–2025), the cumulative upward shift was about 60 places. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 495th place. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were 10, 10, 10, 11, and 8 respectively, with a reduction to 8 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 8, unchanged from 2025, with no change in the plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 11th (Top20) in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a continuous rise in recent years and strong comprehensive strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly due to Yang Yun's moral misconduct and academic integrity incidents, which may have a certain negative impact on some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 56th (relatively hot). No obvious record of enrollment gaps. Beihang is known for engineering, with few History Category majors (only Social Science Experimental Class). The negative public opinion has a relatively limited impact on History Category candidates. Foreign Language and Literature is an A-level discipline, while related disciplines in the Social Science Experimental Class such as Law and Economics have not been individually rated. The overall disciplinary strength of Beihang attracts History Category candidates mainly through the school level rather than specific disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law in 2024 was in a state of differentiation and observation, Chinese Language/Literature was recommended, and the overall popularity of social sciences was stable. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in this province is about 207,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (206,000). Beihang is located in Beijing, not a local university. In 2025, its enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province was about 3.34%, which is a normal proportion. The Beijing region has a strong attraction for Jiangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering positive factors such as the continuous upward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan slightly shifting upward compared to the 2025 baseline (competition slightly easing) (no plan change), and the continuous improvement of school level, as well as negative factors such as the clearly negative reputation public opinion possibly slightly weakening application enthusiasm, based on the 2025 baseline of 495th place, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift upward compared to the 2025 baseline (competition slightly easing) to about 495th place, with a range of 431–549th place.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Law, Administrative Management, Economics) (including Artificial Intelligence-Administrative Management, Law-Artificial Intelligence dual degree programs).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- None (History Category has only 2 majors, tiers are merged for explanation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Social Science Experimental Class (Foreign Language Interdisciplinary Talent Training Experimental Class) (English, Translation) (including English-Artificial Intelligence, Translation-Artificial Intelligence, English-Finance dual degree programs).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Beihang University only recruits 2 majors in the History Category in Jiangxi Province, both in the Social Science Experimental Class. The predicted ranking is about 495th place, with a range of 431–549th place. Candidates within the range can consider both majors simultaneously. The Foreign Language Interdisciplinary Class, due to its dual degree programs and A-level discipline evaluation, offers high cost-effectiveness. Beihang's History Category enrollment is very small (8 students), so candidates need to carefully assess ranking compatibility when applying.
